product: SkillPath AI for Tata Steel Jamshedpur
purpose: AI-enabled L&D intelligence for role-level skill visibility, shopfloor coaching, and expert knowledge capture at Tata Steel Limited, Jamshedpur Works.

companyContext.positioning: A pilot-ready L&D intelligence system for critical steel plant roles.

roles.name: Blast Furnace Operator
roles.sampleQuestion: What should I check when furnace temperature trend becomes unstable?
roles.businessExposure: hot metal quality variation, furnace instability, safety exposure, production loss

criticalSkills.evidence: delayed escalation during abnormal temperature trend simulation
needs coaching on link between burden pattern and hot metal consistency
recertification due and supervisor sign-off pending
shift log shows incomplete abnormality description

roles.name: Steel Melting Shop Technician
roles.sampleQuestion: How should I respond when ladle temperature is outside the target range?
roles.businessExposure: heat chemistry deviation, rework, casting delay, safety-critical molten metal handling

criticalSkills.evidence: temperature deviation case required senior intervention
needs stronger decision logic for chemistry adjustment escalation
PPE and exclusion zone checklist completed but drill score below target
handover notes miss pending lab confirmation status

roles.name: Rolling Mill Operator
roles.sampleQuestion: What should I check when strip thickness variation increases?
roles.businessExposure: customer quality complaints, coil rejection, equipment stress, line stoppage

criticalSkills.evidence: repeat coaching needed on separating roll gap, speed, and material causes
inspection checklist followed but abnormal sound escalation was delayed
surface defect classification mismatch found in quality review
requires refresher for emergency stop and restart authorization

roles.name: Steel Plant Maintenance Technician
roles.sampleQuestion: How should I diagnose a hydraulic pressure drop before replacing parts?
roles.businessExposure: unplanned downtime, unsafe isolation, spare cost, repeated breakdowns

criticalSkills.evidence: parts replaced before root cause confirmation
requires supervised sign-off for complex isolation
missed recurring lubrication and filter-change pattern
fixes not captured after breakdown recovery

knowledge.title: Blast furnace abnormal temperature trend
knowledge.summary: Check recent burden pattern, hot blast parameters, gas trend, cooling water alarms, and shift log before changing operating assumptions. Escalate abnormal temperature movement early.
knowledge.source: Blast furnace operating guidance - training sample
knowledge.escalation: Escalate immediately if temperature trend is abnormal with gas, pressure, or cooling-water warning signs.

knowledge.title: Steel melting ladle temperature deviation
knowledge.summary: Confirm target range, sample timing, ladle condition, waiting time, and pending lab inputs before release. Do not make chemistry or temperature correction without authorized process guidance.
knowledge.source: SMS ladle temperature control - training sample
knowledge.recommendedLearning: Scenario drill: Ladle Temperature and Heat Release Decision
knowledge.escalation: Escalate to shift in-charge or process control if ladle temperature is outside target range.

knowledge.title: Rolling mill thickness variation
knowledge.summary: Check roll gap setting, speed change, incoming material condition, gauge feedback, and mill stand condition. Separate process variation from measurement issue before adjusting repeatedly.
knowledge.source: Rolling mill quality troubleshooting - training sample
knowledge.escalation: Escalate if variation continues after verified setting and measurement checks.

knowledge.title: Hydraulic fault diagnosis in steel plant equipment
knowledge.summary: Check pressure drop, oil temperature, filter condition, actuator leakage, and recent maintenance history before replacing components.
knowledge.recommendedLearning: Scenario drill: Hydraulic Fault Tree Diagnosis
knowledge.escalation: Escalate before bypassing any interlock or replacing high-cost assemblies.

knowledge.title: Expert knowledge capture for steel plant operations
knowledge.summary: Ask experts to describe early warning signs, unsafe shortcuts to avoid, root cause clues, and the fastest safe escalation path for recurring operational issues.
knowledge.source: Steel plant knowledge capture playbook - training sample
knowledge.recommendedLearning: Supervisor guide: Expert Interview to Knowledge Article
knowledge.escalation: Send drafted article to process owner, safety, or quality reviewer before publishing.
